data.body: 264f pre-grounding: needs (1) provider-seam resolve(provider,external_id)->identity searching identities by mappings; (2) reconciler outbound sets Jira assignee by accountId (identity mapping provider=jira,external_id=accountId), bootstrap via /user/search, degrade to project-default(-1)/unassigned when email hidden; (3) reporter by accountId where Modify-Reporter granted. Reconciler pkg = src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/ (namespace-shadowed, tests import as rebar_reconciler; use importlib file-load like bde5 test). Key files: apply_handlers.py/applier.py (outbound apply), acli_rest.py (/user/search + assignee REST). Detailed plan deferred to after e165 commit.
